description: Environment setup and bug fix pass - install deps, verify all imports work, fix any discovered issues

If any import errors occur, fix them by reading the error traceback and patching the relevant source files
Run existing tests with: python3 -m pytest tests/ -x --timeout=30 -q to identify any failures

verification: python3 -c "import augur; from augur.data import fetch_market_context, fetch_market_overview; from augur.datasources import default_providers; from dashboard.app import app; print('ALL OK')"
